---
title: "Axisymmetric vacuum critical collapse with the `bamps`, `prague`, and `sphGR` codes"
# author:
#   - Ananya Adhikari
#   - David Hilditch
#   - Tomas Ledvinka
#   - Thomas Baumgarte
subtitle: Ananya Adhikari
author: CENTRA - Instituto Superior Técnico
institute: "In collaboration with: Thomas W. Baumgarte, Bernd Brügmann, Daniela Cors, David Hilditch, Anton Khirnov, and Tomáš Ledvinka"
date: "July 13, 2026"
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  revealjs:
    multiplex: true
    # footer: "[apreshill.github.io/palmerpenguins-useR-2022/](https://apreshill.github.io/palmerpenguins-useR-2022/)"
    theme: ["pp.scss"]
    slide-number: c #/t
    # incremental: true
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    margin: 0.07
    menu: false
    progress: false
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: viz/cover.png
      data-background-size: cover
include-after-body: title-logos.html
editor: visual
---



##  {.section-title-slide background-image="viz/sec_t17.78_alt.png" background-size="contain" background-position="left"}

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.section-title-text}
General Picture
:::

:::
:::


## The "Golden Ball": Stories in spherical symmetry

Tuning one-parameter $(p)$ families to the collapse threshold :

- Universal power law scaling
- Universal self similar solution
- Arbitratily small black holes
